description_long: This is a rectangular table with a slatted wooden top and a sturdy metal frame. The tabletop consists of evenly spaced wooden slats, providing both visual interest and practical drainage, making it suitable for outdoor use. The frame is constructed from metal, likely steel or aluminum, with four straight legs that offer strong support and stability. The legs are simple and unadorned, with a dark finish that contrasts with the natural wood color of the top. The overall design is minimalist and functional, with no visible decorative elements or attached seating. This table is ideal for urban parks, patios, or communal outdoor spaces where durability and weather resistance are important.
description: A rectangular slatted wood table with a dark metal frame and four straight legs, designed for outdoor or urban use. The minimalist design emphasizes durability and practicality.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow edge of the slatted tabletop and two metal legs.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the slatted tabletop and all four supporting legs.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the opposite narrow edge and two legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the full length of the tabletop and all four legs.
